title: Advancement Optimization│進度優化
description: Modified the actual requirements of some Advancements.│修改了一些進度的實際需求。
body:
# Actual requirements of the modified Advancement│修改後的進度實際需求
1. Cover Me in Debris: Wear a full set of netherite armor.│以瓦礫為壁壘：穿上全套下界合金盔甲。
2. Cover Me with Diamonds: Wear a full set of diamond armor.│用鑽石包覆我：穿上全套鑽石盔甲。
3. Suit Up: Wear a full set of iron armor.│整裝上陣：穿上全套鐵製盔甲。
4. This Boat Has Legs: Just hold Warped Fungus on a Stick while riding a Strider.│畫船添足：只要騎乘熾足獸時，手持扭曲蕈菇釣竿即可。
5. Sniper Duel: You can also shoot Stray and Bogged.│狙擊手對決：射殺流髑、沼骸也可。
